title: userLeave(client:) iterates chats dictionary without lock (race condition)
description: The userLeave(client:Client) method on line 370 iterates 'self.chats' (a [UInt32:Chat] dictionary) without holding chatsLock. This is called when a client disconnects (ServerController.disconnectClient -> chatsController.userLeave). If another thread concurrently adds or removes a chat (e.g., createPublicChat or deletePublicChat), the dictionary iteration can crash due to concurrent mutation of a Swift Dictionary, which is not thread-safe. All other accesses to self.chats go through methods that hold chatsLock, but this one does not.
recommendation: Wrap the iteration in chatsLock.concurrentlyRead, or take a snapshot of the chats dictionary inside the lock before iterating.
